title: Runtime Contract Studio
concept: A settings-first WordPress Playground configuration studio for plugin developers. The first viewport treats WordPress, PHP, language, network, multisite, and reset or reload impact as the primary working surface, while launch, saving, saved management, Site Manager tools, Blueprint gallery, and portability flows open through a top-navigation contextual drawer.
focus: destructive reset and saved reload clarity
light gray workspace with green status accents
flows: Configure WordPress version, PHP version, language, older-version visibility, network access, and multisite before applying a destructive reset or stored Save & Reload.
Launch from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, .zip import, featured Blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination copy states and visible progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with saved identity, creation state, rename, delete, and delete consequence messaging.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, and refresh.
Browse all 43 Blueprints with search/category controls, selected Blueprint detail, inspect, and run actions.
Export to GitHub, download a .zip, or import a .zip over the current site with replacement consequences visible.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
